series_metadata.series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Software User Manuals
series_metadata.series_description: Instruction manuals for UAN clients regarding all aspects of UAN software/hardware.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while needed, then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
